scripts.cleanup:worldscene: rm -f src/scenes/WorldScene.ts && cd .. && git add -A && git status --short | wc -l
scripts.git:commit: cd .. && git commit -F v2/tmp/commitmsg.txt && git log --oneline -2
scripts.assets:music: mkdir -p public/assets/music && cp vendor/NinjaAdventure/audio/music/theme_plain.ogg public/assets/music/overworld.ogg && cp vendor/NinjaAdventure/audio/music/theme_lost_village.ogg public/assets/music/world_a.ogg && cp vendor/NinjaAdventure/audio/music/theme_dream.ogg public/assets/music/world_b.ogg && cp vendor/NinjaAdventure/audio/music/theme_swamp.ogg public/assets/music/boss.ogg && ls -la public/assets/music
scripts.assets:junkala: mkdir -p vendor/junkala && curl -sL 'https://opengameart.org/sites/default/files/Juhani%20Junkala%20%5BChiptune%20Adventures%5D%20OGG.zip' -o vendor/junkala/adventures.zip && cd vendor/junkala && unzip -o adventures.zip && ls -la
scripts.assets:battle: cp 'vendor/junkala/Juhani Junkala [Chiptune Adventures] 1. Stage 1.ogg' public/assets/music/battle.ogg && cp 'vendor/junkala/Juhani Junkala [Chiptune Adventures] 3. Boss Fight.ogg' public/assets/music/boss.ogg && cp 'vendor/junkala/Juhani Junkala [Chiptune Adventures] 4. Stage Select.ogg' public/assets/music/victory.ogg && ls -la public/assets/music
scripts.assets:kenney: mkdir -p vendor/kenney && curl -sL 'https://kenney.nl/media/pages/assets/tiny-dungeon/f8422efb44-1674742415/kenney_tiny-dungeon.zip' -o vendor/kenney/tiny-dungeon.zip && cd vendor/kenney && unzip -oq tiny-dungeon.zip -d tiny-dungeon && find tiny-dungeon -name '*.png' | head -20 && cat tiny-dungeon/License.txt 2>/dev/null || true
